summary: Frontend testing for 8 new static pages and updated footer links - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Landing page footer has correct links - Product links to #features, Company links to /about, /careers, /press, /contact, Legal links to /privacy, /terms, /cookies, /compliance. (2) All 8 static pages load correctly with proper content, Chiantin branding, Back to Home link, and footer links. (3) Navigation works - Back to Home, logo click, footer links all functional. (4) support@chiantin.eu email appears on Contact, Privacy, Terms, Compliance pages.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all 8 static pages and footer links working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 163 tested the 8 new static pages (About, Careers, Press, Contact, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Cookie Policy, Compliance) and updated footer links. All pages use StaticPageLayout component with consistent header (Chiantin logo + Back to Home), hero section, prose-styled content, and footer. All tests passed. Routes configured in App.js lines 2258-2265.
